Objectives of the Program

The objectives of the pharmacy services program are to educate qualified health personnel equipped with the necessary professional knowledge and skills so as to work in all areas needed by the medical and pharmaceutical industry. Having all the devices and equipment they will need throughout their education, our students receive all the necessary theoretical and practical training to perform all tasks in their fields correctly and fully.

Vertical Transition Areas

Provided that they are successful in the Vertical Transfer Exam (DGS) held by ÖSYM, the graduates of this program can further their education in the departments of Biochemistry, Chemical Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Applied Chemistry in order to have an undergraduate degree.

Job Opportunities

Graduates of pharmacy services associate degree program can work in private pharmacies and pharmacy-related departments of public institutions and organizations, pharmaceutical sales companies, pharmaceutical factories, drug stores and laboratories. In addition, with a KPSS exam score, it is possible to be appointed to state hospitals that have pharmacies.

Training Period

2 Years
